content: I'm a bit lost here, started with the blue team since I liked the playstyle. Got Celeste, Caecus, Goliath, Sanga and Faros. Managed to get Vortice and from the Moonless Guide selected Thais, Myriam, Hameln and Tawil. Got Thais and Myriam. I'm kinda torn between keep pulling on moonless to either get the other 2 or get dupes or get more Vortice or her WoD or just save. Not that deep in the story, just finished chapter 2 and also, any suggestions as to what team to run with Vortice as main DPS? I'm running Vortice, Celeste, Caecus and Myriam. I'm thinking Thais wouldn't bring anything to the team if I switch Caecus for example any idea is welcomed. Thanks for reading!

ok so, welcome to the game, second:

1. probably dip from moonless since your main priority is probably getting Vortice’s Enlightens, as for her wod if you happen to have any pulls left over from pulling enlightens grab it otherwise the standard wheels happy magic show or memory spiral work for her, memory spiral would probably take priority if you decide to grab any of these from one of the standard wheel selectors

2. for Vortice teams you can stck to what you’re doing right now, howhever, if you ever happen upon Sanga I’d probably replace her with Caecus since Vortice is a little slow to dish out damage

3. some general tips, Vortice scales basically completely off personal RM and levels so give her the current SR wheelfare wheel, and if you haven’t PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE get her posse from the event story, she is basically a non unit without it

4. have you claimed all the codes yet, and more importantly has anyone dumped 20 guides unto you yet?

1. Aight, will go for her enlightenment.
2. Yeah I have sanga, ill switch Caecus for her.
3 I’m working on her event, but the posse is from the fist section, right? Not the conchs one?.
4 haven’t use any codes, 20 guides? Care to clarify?
its from the blue tab once you click on the event
